description: Run differential expression from workspace matrix and metadata files with Scanpy, DESeq2, edgeR, or bounded CSV fallback.

inputContract.prompt: Must include matrixRef and metadataRef; may include groupColumn, caseGroup, controlGroup, alpha, runner.

environment.migrationStatus: workspace Python CSV task; production runner backends should be added inside this task

examplePrompts: Run Scanpy differential expression matrixRef=data/counts.csv metadataRef=data/meta.csv runner=scanpy
